headings: H1:Discover patterns in writing style
H2:Style leaves traces.
H2:A corpus is already an argument.
H2:One setting is not evidence.
H2:Distance is a relation, not a verd
H2:Keep what changes visible.
H2:Take the record, not just the pict
H2:Bring your corpus. Keep the choice
